## Checklist

- [ ] Branch name follows the convention (`feature/*`, `fix/*`, `chore/*`, `docs/*`)
- [ ] Commits follow the `type(scope): description` format
- [ ] All CI checks pass (backend, python, frontend, docker)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or `.env` files committed
- [ ] Documentation updated if behaviour changed
- [ ] No debug code, commented-out blocks, or `TODO` placeholders left in
